ST_VOText.RancherGC4Line0: Both my parents were zoologists, real academic bookworms, heh.
ST_VOText.BotanistWC0Line1: But I suppose it removes the watering of crops from the equation.
ST_VOText.PRRancherM4Intro2Line0: But I've seen a bunch of eggs lying around!
ST_VOText.RancherM5Intro1Line1: But all of this research is taking up the time I had intended to spend on sprucing up my property.
ST_VOText.PiperIntroduction0Line3: But before anything else, let's put that mech of yours back in one piece.
ST_VOText.PiperIntroduction2Line3: But enough introductions, let's get you situated and make you at home.
ST_VOText.RancherM4End0Line2: But even so, I was able to gather samples of an identical substance from all of them!
ST_VOText.ToolFound3Line2: But for generations, they've managed to thrive here.
ST_VOText.GrasslandsVaultCrossingWater0Line3: But hey, that kind of ability is bound to be useful.
ST_VOText.BotanistGC2Line1: But j-just like the leaf on my head, they have been growing on me ever since.
ST_VOText.VaultDoorStatus0Line1: But let's keep our eyes peeled and sensors open, yeah?
ST_VOText.RuinFound3Line6: But looking back, I still wish I'd acted differently.
ST_VOText.RegionRestored4Line3: But now you're here, and we're turning things around!
ST_VOText.RancherM4Intro0Line2: But sentimentality is not my goal, I have a mission to see through.
ST_VOText.RegionRestored2Line6: But we all knew sacrifices were necessary.
ST_VOText.StoreGreeting3Line0: Buying or selling? Make your pick!
ST_VOText.MRSuggestionBuy1Line1: Can't hurt to check out the store and see what's available.
ST_VOText.PlantedSeed1Line0: Can't wait to see it grow up!
ST_VOText.MerchantIntroduction0Line4: Catch me there if you need anything!
ST_VOText.RancherM5End0Line4: Come by next morning and we'll see what the results are!
ST_VOText.StoreGreeting2Line0: Come on up and take a look!
ST_VOText.VaultDoorOpening0Line2: Come on, we need to investigate further!
ST_VOText.BotanistM3Intro0Line1: Comparing it to an unaffected counterpart, I believe we may be looking at a one-in-five chance of a beneficial mutation occurring!
ST_VOText.VaultDoorStatus1Line1: Could... could this place have been activated somehow?
ST_VOText.VaultDoorFound0Line1: Did some scans on it many years ago but the readings were mostly nonsense.
ST_VOText.GrasslandsVaultCrossingWater0Line1: Did you just harness that alien energy source to cross the water?
ST_VOText.PRBotanistM6Intro2Line0: Didn't you say failure is also a result?
ST_VOText.PRRancherM2Intro0Line0: Do you do that often on your planet?
ST_VOText.GrasslandsVaultSleepingChamber0Line1: Doesn't look like an especially comfortable arrangement to me.
ST_VOText.CloseToRT0Line2: Doesn't seem like the signal's strong enough, though.
ST_VOText.Headlights1Line0: Don't forget about those headlights of yours!
ST_VOText.RancherWC6Line0: Don't forget to hydrate yourself and any animal nearby today, the heat of the sun can really sneak up on you after a few hours.
ST_VOText.MRSuggestionWater0Line0: Don't forget to water your crops today!
ST_VOText.ExitMech0Line0: Don't forget where you parked it.
ST_VOText.RancherGC8Line0: Don't have many relatives left out here in the Frontier, but I've never been lonely for a second.
ST_VOText.PRRancherM1End0Line0: Don't worry, you can rely on me!
ST_VOText.DamFound0Line3: Either way, it's no matter now. For all intents and purposes, it's just another mountain.
ST_VOText.RancherM1End3Line0: Enough chit-chat, back to the matter at hand! Eggs put in an incubator should hatch within a couple of days.
ST_VOText.ArtifactComplete3Line0: Eureka! I've figured out what this place was used for.
ST_VOText.RancherGC14Line1: Eventually, people started leaving the Collective and returned to the CFD. Only a few of us were stubborn enough to spread out across the Frontier and keep searching for the answer.
ST_VOText.BotanistM2End0Line0: Excellent! Now, I-I think I owe you an explanation on what my experiments are for. It wouldn't do to have a re-research partner that is kept in the dark.
ST_VOText.PiperIntroduction2Line0: Excuse my manners, one kinda stops expecting guests after 200 years.
ST_VOText.NewDiscovery3Line0: Fascinating! I'll add it to the records.
ST_VOText.RuinFound0Line3: Feel free to scrutinize them, maybe you'll spot something I missed.
ST_VOText.FeedingCreature3Line0: Feels good to give something back to the wildlife.
ST_VOText.HarvestingCrop1Line0: Finally, reaping the fruits of our labor!
ST_VOText.RegionRestored2Line3: First part's pretty self-explanatory, I look at a planet and tell Earth if it can sustain human life.
ST_VOText.RancherM4Intro7Line1: For each egg you might collect and bring home, there's a bunch that naturally hatch in the wild.
ST_VOText.BotanistM4Intro2Line0: G-great! Come and find me when you have procured the samples.
ST_VOText.BotanistM2Intro1Line0: G-great! In that case, why don't you try splicing some seeds and planting them? Just a few, f-for starters.
ST_VOText.HazardModerateSuccess3Line0: Glad that's over, now let's clean up this mess!
ST_VOText.RancherM6Intro3Line2: Go ahead and set things up here while I head back to my planet and get things in order!
ST_VOText.MechanicDialogueStart0Line0: Go on then, what is it?
ST_VOText.BotanistGreeting7Line0: God dag, l-like my dad used to say!
ST_VOText.BotanistM1Mid1Line0: Good! G-glad to make your a-acquaintance.
ST_VOText.MRStorySeeing0Line0: Gotta say, I was just taken by the beauty of the scenery.
ST_VOText.RestorationAction4Line0: Great! Bet that'll make a difference around here!
ST_VOText.RancherM1Mid3Line0: Great! Let's begin by building an Egg Incubator. Here, I'll send you the blueprint so you can make your own as well.
ST_VOText.VaultDoorOpening0Line1: Guess there still are surprises left for this old piece of space junk...
ST_VOText.BotanistGC0Line1: H-hopefully, I can get it sorted out and give it another attempt this evening.
ST_VOText.GrasslandsVaultEnterComputerRoom0Line0: Hey, it's not just me right?
ST_VOText.VaultDoorStatus1Line2: Hmm, but it looks like it's got a bit more to go.
ST_VOText.GrasslandsVaultFirstMissingPower0Line0: Hmm, looks like this door is missing power.
ST_VOText.GrasslandsVaultSecondComputerPuzzle0Line: Hmm... but their coordinates are still unavailable.
ST_VOText.MechFall1Line0: Hope that didn't scratch the paint...
ST_VOText.MRRainyWeather3Line0: Hope you brought an umbrella, today's a rainy one.
ST_VOText.ExitMech2Line0: Hopping out for some fresh air?
ST_VOText.MRSuggestionSell0Line1: How about selling some off and make a quick buck?
ST_VOText.MRSuggestionUpgrade0Line1: How about taking it to the dock and seeing what's available?
ST_VOText.PRRancherM4Intro2Line1: How can you not know where the eggs come from?
ST_VOText.PRBotanistM2End1Line1: How is this relevant to your research?
ST_VOText.RequestTurnInMerchant1Line0: Huge thanks, that's a load off my shoulders!
ST_VOText.BotanistWC1Line0: I actually d-do not mind the rainfall.
ST_VOText.BotanistM1Mid0Line1: I appreciate you taking the time to m-make this Outpost for me.
ST_VOText.RancherM6Intro1Line1: I assumed it was some kind of residue from a plant or a mineral, a hint to a place where all the eggs originate from.
ST_VOText.BotanistM4End0Line2: I believe it is reasonable to assume that something or someone has actively modified its cell structure through mutation.
ST_VOText.StoreSell3Line0: I bet I can find a buyer for this stuff.
ST_VOText.StoreGreeting4Line0: I bet you I have just the thing you need!
ST_VOText.PiperGratitude3Line0: I can always count on you!
ST_VOText.RancherM5Intro1Line0: I can take good enough care of myself, thank you very much.
ST_VOText.MRSuggestionArtifacts1Line0: I can't help but feel like we've got some unfinished business in them ruins.
ST_VOText.MRBuiltDecorationConstruct1Line0: I can't stop admiring those nice decorations you built yesterday.
ST_VOText.ArtifactFound0Line0: I can't wait to analyze this!
ST_VOText.BotanistReceivePlant3Line0: I can't wait to conduct my research!
ST_VOText.RancherBC0Line0: I could hardly sleep last night, some dang critter was macking a ruckus!
ST_VOText.RuinFound3Line4: I couldn't risk them marking this planet as a dud.
ST_VOText.MRStoryListener0Line2: I didn't realize how lonely I was until there was someone else.
ST_VOText.PRBotanistM2Intro1Line1: I do enjoy a good gamble.
ST_VOText.RancherM6End1Line2: I don't like being a liability, but it's no excuse for being ungrateful, I'm sorry for how I've treated you.
ST_VOText.GenericWorried2Line0: I don't like the look of this.
ST_VOText.MRSuggestionUpgrade1Line0: I don't mean to criticize, but your mech has yet to reach its top potential.
ST_VOText.RancherGC5Line0: I don't see a lot of people these days but I've got some old friends I keep in touch with via handwritten mail.
ST_VOText.RancherGC12Line0: I dropped out not long after joining the Collective to start going on expeditions with them. We made new discoveries every single day back then, before we hit our dead end.
ST_VOText.GrasslandsVaultThirdComputerPuzzle0Line2: I found an access request for the coordinates of another shelter!
ST_VOText.BotanistBC0Line0: I found an in-interesting piece of bark this morning, I c-can't wait to run some tests on it!
ST_VOText.RancherM5Intro0Line1: I got so caught up in researching the egg shards and messaging my colleagues, I plain forgot to sleep!
ST_VOText.RuinFound2Line1: I gotta admit, they do look a lot more intriguing from your point of view.
ST_VOText.GrasslandsVaultAfterFirstPuzzle0Line1: I guess cable management is a hassle in all corners of the galaxy.
ST_VOText.MRStoryListener0Line3: I had nobody to talk to but myself, and trust me, I'm a terrible listener.
ST_VOText.RancherM3Intro1Line2: I had the thought to spruce up my surroundings a bit, make things more comfortable around here.
ST_VOText.BotanistM6Mid0Line1: I hate to keep asking, but would you be so kind and make a few more additions to the surroundings?
ST_VOText.BotanistM5Intro0Line1: I have been thinking about expanding my outpost a bit more, but the research is consuming most of my days.
ST_VOText.BotanistM3End0Line1: I have considered venturing out on more excursions to find out what more this fascinating planet could offer.
ST_VOText.RancherM3Intro1Line3: I have the blueprints all laid out, but now my elbow's acting up and I keep making a mess of things.
ST_VOText.RancherM2Intro1Line0: I haven't had to in quite a while now that you mention it. I think they all learned their place eventually.
ST_VOText.RequestAcceptBotanist2Line0: I hope it's not a bother to you.
ST_VOText.BotanistGC5Line0: I hope the l-letter that I wrote my parents yesterday arrives quickly.
ST_VOText.MRGreetings4Line0: I hope you're well this fine mornin'!
ST_VOText.RancherGC11Line0: I joined the Exozoology Collective in my sophomore year at the Directorate University.
ST_VOText.BotanistM5End0Line2: I just need a bit more time.
ST_VOText.RegionRestored3Line1: I just realized I forgot to tell you what the R in my name stands for.
ST_VOText.RegionRestored1Line1: I knew this planet had more beauty to uncover, It just needed a little TLC, is all.
ST_VOText.GenericPositive4Line0: I knew you could do it!
ST_VOText.MRStorySeeing0Line2: I know I said I've been watching this planet for 200 years but...
ST_VOText.RancherSC0Line0: I know what you're thinking. "Why does not knowing where eggs come from stop you from animal husbandry?"
ST_VOText.BotanistM3Intro0Line2: I need to run more t-tests to confirm, but I am also interested in furnishing this outpost a bit more.
ST_VOText.RancherGC9Line0: I never cared much for the hustle and bustle of the CFD, so much red tape involved for even the simplest of things.
ST_VOText.RuinFound3Line2: I never sent any data about the ruins to Earth.
ST_VOText.BotanistM4End2Line1: I once f-failed to properly assess the risks and caused sig-significant injury to myself and others.
ST_VOText.BotanistM1Mid3Line0: I promise I can c-compensate- Oh!
ST_VOText.BotanistWC2Line1: I recommend that you keep an eye on the compass if you are heading out today.
ST_VOText.BuiltRT0Line4: I run botanic experiments on the local flora, but I've run out of supplies.
ST_VOText.RancherGC15Line0: I saw some animals returning over in the Mountainside Coast. Good job fixing that place up, really did them a favor.
ST_VOText.RegionRestored0Line3: I sent countless reports to Earth, telling them this was it, a new home for humanity.
ST_VOText.RancherGC1Line0: I think the different hues of the lenses simulate various weather conditions, and the eggs mutate in response.
ST_VOText.CraftingResource3Line0: I think we know just where to use that one.
ST_VOText.GrasslandsVaultSleepingChamber0Line0: I think we've found where the former inhabitants resided.
ST_VOText.RancherWC0Line1: I thought I felt something in my bones...
ST_VOText.RegionRestored4Line2: I thought I was just a defunct heap of space junk left to litter in orbit.
ST_VOText.RancherM6Intro1Line2: I thought maybe there was a secret breeding ground all animals had in common, but I was completely wrong!
ST_VOText.RuinFound0Line2: I tried scanning them with all my instruments, over and over, got nothing to show for it.
ST_VOText.BotanistSC1Line1: I understand if-if you prefer to make some extra money, but do consider trading them with me instead next time.
ST_VOText.RancherGC5Line1: I usually have the young merchant pick them up on her route, there's a junction she drops them off at halfway between here and the CFD.
ST_VOText.BotanistSC1Line0: I w-was taken a bit aback the other day when Lola tried to sell me some mutated crops.
ST_VOText.RancherM4Intro7Line2: I want to study the shards of those eggs. I've got a few places I want to search but it'll be faster if you help me scour the other regions.
ST_VOText.RegionRestored3Line4: I was built to last. The others... weren't.
ST_VOText.BotanistM4Intro0Line1: I was o-out exploring the vicinity yesterday and that colossal tree with massive roots sprawling out from the ground has me quite intrigued.
ST_VOText.BotanistWC4Line0: I was thinking about going on a hike later today, s-since we are having such fine weather.
ST_VOText.BotanistGC10Line0: I went for a stroll around Pine Heights, it-it was beautiful!
ST_VOText.BotanistM6End1Line1: I will begin planning the next step in our scientific journey!
ST_VOText.BotanistM4End1Line0: I will keep working on it and attempt to synthesize the cellular modifications.
ST_VOText.ArtifactFound4Line0: I wonder what this could be...
ST_VOText.MRStorySeeing0Line7: I would never have seen any of this without you.
ST_VOText.BotanistM6Intro4Line3: I would very much like to spend more time here to continue my work, b-but it would require a more permanent residence.
ST_VOText.BotanistM1End0Line3: I'd be more than h-happy to give you my spare sprouts in exchange for mutated crops, u-unless you want to sell them instead, th-that's fine too...
ST_VOText.MechanicIntro0Line3: I'd like to see for myself to make sure, but I need someone to build me an outpost to land on first.
ST_VOText.PlayerRancherTradeStarter0Line0: I'd like to trade some eggs.
ST_VOText.GrasslandsVaultAfterFirstPuzzle0Line2: I'll keep scanning the energy circuits to try and figure out how their tech works.
ST_VOText.MechanicReceiveResource0Line0: I'll make good use of it.
ST_VOText.PRRancherM2End1Line0: I'll make good use of them!
ST_VOText.RancherM1Intro0Line2: I'm Diane by the way, I run the animal sanctuary ‘round these parts.
ST_VOText.MRSuggestionRequest0Line0: I'm feeling extra generous today. We should do something nice.
ST_VOText.MRPositivity3Line0: I'm feeling really good about today, bet we'll run into something amazing!
ST_VOText.MRSuggestionVaultDoor0Line1: I'm getting some crazy strong energy readings from it.
ST_VOText.RancherM4Intro0Line1: I'm happy to help you get started on keeping animals on your farm. Really, it warms my heart to see you build bonds with these fantastic creatures.
ST_VOText.MechanicIntro0Line2: I'm in need of high grade metals, and it looks like there may be some deposits on your planet.
ST_VOText.BotanistM6End0Line1: I'm looking forward to conducting more research together with you.
ST_VOText.RancherM6Intro3Line1: I'm moving my sanctuary here, I'm not leaving this planet until we find this creature!
ST_VOText.RancherM4Intro1Line0: I'm part of the Exozoology Collective, with the goal to find creatures suitable for animal husbandry in the Frontier.
ST_VOText.MRStoryListener0Line0: I'm really thankful that you're here, y'know?
ST_VOText.RancherSC3Line0: I'm starting to make myself at home in the house you built me. Sitting up on that top terrace, keeping a lookout on nearby animals, is actually quite comfortable.
ST_VOText.MRSuggestionBuy0Line1: I'm sure there's something in the store you could treat yourself to.
ST_VOText.RancherM1End2Line0: I'm well aware of my limits, thank you!
ST_VOText.RancherM4Intro7Line0: I've been researching the wildlife on your planet for a while now and I think I've found a new lead.
ST_VOText.RancherM1Mid2Line2: I've been studying them for a long time and yet I still find new things to uncover. Don't underestimate their potential.
ST_VOText.MRSuggestionUpgrade0Line0: I've been thinking, your mech could do with some upgrades.
ST_VOText.GrasslandsVaultThirdComputerPuzzle0Line6: I've downloaded the coordinates, let's go check it out!
ST_VOText.PlayerRancherCollectionStarter0Line0: I've got some stuff you might want.
ST_VOText.RancherM4Intro0Line0: I've got something important to talk to you about.
ST_VOText.MRSuggestionSell0Line0: I've noticed you're carrying a lot of goods in your storage.
ST_VOText.RancherM4End0Line0: I've run the tests twice and I've got some exciting news!
ST_VOText.BotanistM2End3Line6: I-I am eagerly awaiting the results of your harvest!
ST_VOText.BotanistGC3Line0: I-I could never get bored of plants.
ST_VOText.BotanistM1Mid4Line1: I-I don't mean to overstep, so it would be good to know where the b-borders are.
ST_VOText.BotanistSC0Line1: I-I have been able to make quick progress on all my research projects.
ST_VOText.BotanistM6Intro4Line4: I-I know it is a lot to ask, but would you be able to help me out with this?
ST_VOText.BotanistM6End1Line0: I-I was very much hoping you would say that.
ST_VOText.BotanistM4End1Line3: I-I will not fail this time...
ST_VOText.BotanistM4Intro1Line0: I-I would like to gather some samples and examine them a bit closer.
ST_VOText.BotanistM5Intro0Line2: I-If you have some time to help me out, I would very much appreciate it!
ST_VOText.BotanistM1Mid4Line0: I-if it's not too much to ask, would you mind constructing a boundary around the o-outpost?
ST_VOText.BotanistSC1Line2: I-if that's alright with you, that is!
ST_VOText.BotanistWC0Line0: I-it is really pouring down today...
ST_VOText.BotanistM6Intro5Line0: I... thank you for your faith in me.
ST_VOText.GrasslandsVaultAfterSecondPuzzle0Line1: If I had any form of direct access, I could perhaps take control of it...
ST_VOText.RancherGC1Line1: If I'm not mistaken, it's a bit like crocodilians on Earth that will hatch differently depending on the ambient temperature.
ST_VOText.RequestAcceptBotanist0Line0: If it's not too much to ask...
ST_VOText.RegionRestored1Line2: If my long range transmitter hadn't broken ages ago I'd send Earth one final report:
ST_VOText.MechanicIntro0Line6: If that sounds like a fair deal, build that outpost.
ST_VOText.VaultDoorStatus0Line0: If there is more to it, I haven't been able to figure it out.
ST_VOText.FindRTSpot0Line1: If we build a radio tower right here, I betcha we'll be able to send a reply.
ST_VOText.RancherSC1Line1: If we can't breed for the most desired traits, we're starting over with each generation. That's why we need to figure out how the eggs are made!
ST_VOText.GrasslandsVaultEnterComputerRoom0Line2: If we get it running again, I could try to connect!
ST_VOText.MerchantIntroduction0Line3: If you build me a place to land, I’ll add it to my trading route.
ST_VOText.MRSuggestionArtifacts0Line1: If you have the time, maybe we should go and take another look?
ST_VOText.RancherM5Intro1Line2: If you want to make yourself useful, why don't you lend a hand and finish these things up for me? That way I can get my research done with faster, OK? OK!
ST_VOText.RuinFound1Line1: If you're worried about alien monsters, don't be.
ST_VOText.BotanistM6End0Line2: If-if you are still interested, that is?
ST_VOText.RegionRestored4Line1: In all honesty, I was beginning to lose hope until you showed up.
ST_VOText.RegionRestored0Line2: In all my years I've never seen anything like it.
ST_VOText.GrasslandsVaultTunnel0Line1: In any case, not like we can ask the artist.
ST_VOText.PRBotanistM6Intro1Line1: Isn't there anything we can try?
ST_VOText.BotanistGC7Line1: It allowed me to create an edible paste that kept me sustained for three days, w-would you believe it?
ST_VOText.ToolFound1Line0: It always puzzled me why Earth was so quick to give up on the Farmech Project.
ST_VOText.BotanistM2End3Line4: It is a random process, but it should still yield some promising results before long.
ST_VOText.BotanistGC1Line1: It is actually the r-result of an experiment on a plant-based hair regrowth formula.
ST_VOText.RancherWC4Line0: It really is quite sunny out here today, better make sure the animals have their access to water sorted out.
ST_VOText.BuiltDecoration4Line0: It really ties the farm together.
ST_VOText.BotanistWC5Line0: It seems like the w-weather will allow for an outdoor experiment today.
ST_VOText.RegionRestored3Line6: It was 100 or so years ago when the last one went dark.
ST_VOText.ToolFound2Line1: It was a LOT closer and would sustain Earth’s population.
ST_VOText.RancherFarewell6Line0: It was good to see you!
ST_VOText.RancherM6Intro1Line3: It wasn't until one of my colleagues shared her hypothesis, after running her own tests on...
ST_VOText.BotanistM1Intro0Line5: It would be easier to explain what I can offer you in person, so if-if-if it's not too much of a bother, I need you to prepare me a place to land on.
ST_VOText.BotanistM4Intro1Line1: It would be of great a-assistance if you could take samples from the exposed roots.
ST_VOText.HologramContribution3Line0: It'll be great when it's done.
ST_VOText.RegionRestored2Line2: It's "Planetary Inhabitability Probe", 3rd Generation, Model R.
ST_VOText.VaultDoorStatus3Line1: It's about as energized as it could get!
ST_VOText.DamFound0Line1: It's an ancient megastructure, no way to tell what it was built for.
ST_VOText.RancherM6Intro2Line0: It's an animal! A single animal!
ST_VOText.MRStorySeeing0Line1: It's completely different seeing it from your mech unit's sensors.
ST_VOText.MRSuggestionArtifacts1Line1: It's faint but I'm still picking up some artifact readings, if you want to go excavating.
ST_VOText.SleepReminder0Line0: It's getting late, let's clock out for the day.
ST_VOText.HologramContribution2Line0: It's getting there, keep at it!
ST_VOText.RancherM4Mid0Line2: It's going to take a while so no need to wait around. Come by again tomorrow and I'll tell you what I've found!
ST_VOText.GrasslandsVaultSleepingChamber0Line2: It's like they crammed tens of thousands of accommodations into this one room.
ST_VOText.RancherM6Intro2Line2: It's like... like an Easter Bunny placing eggs all over!
ST_VOText.RancherM3Intro1Line1: It's nothing, I just can't seem to hold my hammer steady.
ST_VOText.RancherM2Intro3Line2: It's pretty easy to see what's wrong if you check in on them, so see if you can fulfil all their needs and come back to me when you've got some happy campers on your farm.
ST_VOText.MRBuiltDecorationConstruct0Line1: It's really beginning to feel like a home.
ST_VOText.RancherM3Intro2Line0: It's truly no big deal, I'll take care of it as soon as my joints start behaving again.
ST_VOText.BotanistM6Intro1Line0: It's useless, the traits are intrinsically connected. All it does is create a blown-up piece of scenery!
ST_VOText.BotanistM6Intro4Line2: It-it has also proved the potential of this planet as a staging ground for my research.
ST_VOText.BotanistM1Intro0Line6: It-it will be worth your while, promise!
ST_VOText.BotanistM6Intro0Line1: It-it would seem to be the case that the very same mutation that causes the extreme growth also renders its insides highly... toxic.
ST_VOText.BotanistM6Mid0Line0: It-it's magnificent! The greenhouse will be useful for my experiments, a-a wonderful surprise!
ST_VOText.ToolFound4Line3: I’m just happy to finally have some company.
ST_VOText.RancherM6Mid0Line1: Just a few more fine details to finish up before our base of operations is complete!
ST_VOText.BotanistM4Mid0Line1: Just give me some time and then we can look at the results together.
ST_VOText.BotanistM1End1Line1: Just give me the w-word when you are ready.
ST_VOText.RancherM1Mid1Line0: Just hear me out before you try to crack it open, OK?
ST_VOText.ToolFound3Line0: Just think about the thousands of people who initially came to the Frontier.
ST_VOText.MRRestoredRegion0Line2: Keep a look out, will you?
ST_VOText.RancherSC2Line0: Keep experimenting with that Egg Incubator you built, it's always nice to make some new friends.
ST_VOText.RancherGC2Line0: Keeping your animals happy takes more than just food, water, and headpats. They need plenty of stimulation as well!
ST_VOText.MRStorySeeing0Line6: Let alone a hundred blowing in the wind.
ST_VOText.PlayerMerchantStoreStarter0Line0: Let me check out your wares.
ST_VOText.StoreSell0Line0: Let me take that off your hands.
ST_VOText.MRSuggestionBuild0Line0: Let's build something jaw dropping today!
ST_VOText.MRSuggestionRequest0Line1: Let's check if our neighbors need help with something.
ST_VOText.MRPositivity0Line0: Let's do some exploring today, who knows what we'll find out there?
ST_VOText.SleepReminder2Line0: Let's get some sleep and pick this up again tomorrow.
ST_VOText.EnterMech2Line0: Let's get this show on the road!
ST_VOText.CloseToRT0Line3: Let's make our way uphill to get better reception.
ST_VOText.BasicResourcePickUp1Line0: Let's put that to good use!
ST_VOText.HarvestingCrop4Line0: Let's put this crop to good use.
ST_VOText.MRBuiltCoreConstruct2Line0: Let's see what we can do now that we've got a new building on the farm.
ST_VOText.RegionRestored2Line0: Look at that! Another region fit for life.
ST_VOText.RuinFound3Line1: Look, I have a bit of a confession to make.
ST_VOText.ToolFound4Line0: Look, I know you weren't sent here for a mission that's been canceled for nearly two centuries.
ST_VOText.RancherM6End1Line1: Look, I'll be the first to admit it, I'm not great at asking for help when I need it.
ST_VOText.MechanicIntro0Line5: Look, to make it worth your while, I could build some new parts for that mech of yours.
ST_VOText.BotanistM4Intro0Line2: Looking at the surrounding flora, the obvious conclusion is that some form of mutation has affected it.
ST_VOText.GrasslandsVaultThirdComputerPuzzle0Line3: Looks like one of the residents wanted to make their way over there?
ST_VOText.VaultDoorStatus3Line0: Looks like the readings have peaked now.
ST_VOText.GrasslandsVaultMainHall1Line0: Looks like the water down there runs throughout this whole facility.
ST_VOText.GrasslandsVaultSecondComputerPuzzle0Line: Looks like this is one of several underground shelters.
ST_VOText.HazardAlert2Line0: Looks like we've got uninvited guests at the farm.
ST_VOText.MRNoSleep0Line0: Looks like you didn't sleep a wink, you alright?
ST_VOText.RancherM5End0Line0: Looks like you're finished. Good timing, too, I'm nearly done with my research!
ST_VOText.RancherGC3Line1: Luckily the ones you raise aren't as stubborn.
ST_VOText.PiperIntroduction0Line2: Luckily your biometrics tell me you’re a-okay.
ST_VOText.MRRestoredRegion0Line1: Maybe there is some more good to be done around here?
ST_VOText.FindBadRegion0Line2: Maybe we could fix em back up, but it would take a lot of work.
ST_VOText.MRBuiltCoreConstruct1Line0: Maybe we could put that new building to good use!
ST_VOText.MRSuggestionRequest1Line1: Maybe we should ask our neighbors if we can do something for them.
ST_VOText.ScaredCreature4Line0: Maybe we should leave the mech behind if we want to get close.
ST_VOText.PRBotanistM2End0Line0: Maybe you should have lead with that.
ST_VOText.RancherGC4Line1: Me, I prefer to get my hands dirty. Nothing like a little practical study to brighten your day.
ST_VOText.RuinFound2Line0: More ruins? I haven't seen these ones before.
ST_VOText.MRGreetings2Line0: Mornin', hope you had a good night's sleep!
ST_VOText.GrasslandsVaultThirdComputerPuzzle0Line4: Must've been brave to face whatever they built this for...
ST_VOText.BotanistM4End2Line0: Mutations c-can sometimes act in unpredictable and... dangerous ways.
ST_VOText.RancherM1End0Line1: My back started acting up again, stupid thing. Otherwise I would have done my share of the work.
ST_VOText.RuinFound3Line3: My mission was to find them a new world to inhabit, not an old hand-me-down.
ST_VOText.BotanistM1Intro0Line2: My name is Ulf and, uh, I live on the planet next door.
ST_VOText.BuiltRT0Line2: My name is Ulf and, uh, I live on the planet next door.
ST_VOText.BotanistGC6Line0: My planet up there is co-completely filled with all kinds of fungi.
ST_VOText.MerchantIntroduction0Line1: My scanners weren't lying, there really was someone out here in this corner of the frontier!
ST_VOText.BotanistM2End3Line0: My, um, our view was that we could prevent the future resource shortage by growing better crops.
ST_VOText.PiperIntroduction2Line1: Name’s PIP-3R! That’s Piper, for short.
ST_VOText.BotanistM1End0Line2: Naturally, most of my experiments don't result in dramatic mutations, but I end up with perfectly good sprouts instead.
ST_VOText.GrasslandsVaultFirstComputerPuzzle0Line5: Need a bit more energy for full access though...
ST_VOText.PRBotanistM1Mid3Line1: Need anything else while I'm at it?
ST_VOText.RequestTurnInMerchant2Line0: Nice work. I knew I could count on you!
ST_VOText.NewDiscovery4Line0: Nice, I bet that one will prove useful!
ST_VOText.WateredCrop0Line0: Nice, this will hold it over until tomorrow.
ST_VOText.RancherM4Intro1Line2: No matter how many planets we've scoured and animals we've studied, none of them have fit the bill.
ST_VOText.ToolFound4Line2: No need to answer, it doesn't matter anymore.
ST_VOText.PRRancherM1Mid0Line0: No problem, good to see you!
ST_VOText.MRSuggestionHarvest0Line1: No use in waiting for that sweet reward any longer than needed.
ST_VOText.MRStorySeeing0Line5: None of my instruments ever told me what a falling leaf looks like.
ST_VOText.RancherM2End0Line1: Not only can you feel proud of your work, but you might find that happy animals will leave you more gifts in the morning.
ST_VOText.ScaredCreature0Line0: Not sure they appreciate a stomping mech.
ST_VOText.RancherM4Intro3Line1: Not the animals you're raising, that's for sure!
ST_VOText.MRGreetings5Line0: Nothin' like a good night's rest!
ST_VOText.RancherM4End3Line0: Now I don't have a single clue as for where to start looking for this common source, but I'm going to keep running tests and see what I can find!
ST_VOText.PiperIntroduction1Line0: Now flip that sucker sunny-side up, and hop in.
ST_VOText.VaultDoorStatus1Line0: Now hang on a second, the energy readings are spiking right now!
ST_VOText.BuiltCore1Line0: Now this should make things easier.
ST_VOText.Headlights2Line0: Now would be a good time for headlights.
ST_VOText.RancherM2End2Line1: Now, I'd love to study the materials your animals leave for you. So if you have some to spare, you know where to find me!
ST_VOText.RancherM2Intro3Line0: Now, there's more to raising animals than just hatching eggs, you need to make sure their needs are met.
ST_VOText.BotanistM4Mid0Line0: O-oh you did it! Those samples look extraordinary. I will put them under the microscope right away.
ST_VOText.BotanistM5End0Line1: O-oh, and I believe we are nearing a breakthrough on those megaflora samples you brought me the other day!
ST_VOText.RancherM4Intro3Line0: Of course, but where do they come from?
ST_VOText.RancherM3Intro1Line0: Oh dear, did I say that out loud?
ST_VOText.RancherM2End1Line0: Oh it can be things like a loose feather or a tuft of hair. It might not mean a lot to you but this is how they show their love.
ST_VOText.RancherM1End1Line0: Oh there will be none of that, I'll have to earn my keep, don't I?
ST_VOText.VaultDoorFound0Line0: Oh, I forgot to mention this door. It completely slipped my mind.
ST_VOText.FeedingCreature0Line0: Oh, I think it really liked that one!
ST_VOText.RancherM6Intro0Line0: Oh, it's incredible! You won't believe it!
ST_VOText.BotanistM1End0Line0: Oh, thi-this is splendid! With the Seed Splicer in place we can...
ST_VOText.FindBadRegion0Line0: Oh, this place is in a bad way, the ecosystem's out of whack.
ST_VOText.NewDiscovery0Line0: Oh, we haven't seen that one before!
ST_VOText.RancherM5Intro0Line0: Oh, what's that? Sorry, I'm feeling a bit out of it.
ST_VOText.RancherGratitude4Line0: Oh, you're gonna make an old lady cry.
ST_VOText.RegionRestored3Line0: Once again life returns, nice work!
ST_VOText.RegionRestored3Line5: One by one, their signals went out.
ST_VOText.RancherM5End0Line1: One of my colleagues had a very interesting hypothesis on the nature of the substance found on the egg shards. I just need to run one... more... test.
ST_VOText.FeedingCreature4Line0: One tasty treat coming right up!
ST_VOText.StoreSell4Line0: One's trash is... You know the line.
ST_VOText.MRSuggestionWater0Line1: Otherwise, it'll be a bit tough for them to grow.
ST_VOText.SproutPlanted0Line0: Ouf, that cannon's got a kick to it...
ST_VOText.BotanistM2End2Line1: Our department was dedicated to the long-term sustainability of our population here in the Frontier.
ST_VOText.MRSuggestionSell1Line0: Our stockpile's getting pretty full, how about selling off the extras?
ST_VOText.ScaredCreature1Line0: Perhaps a more light-footed approach is needed here.
ST_VOText.GrasslandsVaultMainHall1Line1: Perhaps it was part of some closed hydration system?
ST_VOText.MRBuiltCoreConstruct0Line0: Perhaps we can find some use for that new building you made yesterday.
ST_VOText.RegionRestored1Line4: Plus maybe a few choice words you don't need to hear.
ST_VOText.ScaredCreature3Line0: Poor thing, your mech scared the daylights out of 'em.
ST_VOText.PlantedSeed2Line0: Pop! Into the soil it goes!
ST_VOText.SleepReminder1Line0: Probably time to get some shuteye, huh?
ST_VOText.MRNoSleep1Line0: Pulled an all-nighter, huh? Don't push yourself too hard.
ST_VOText.BotanistM1End1Line0: R-right then. We have everything we need to get started!
ST_VOText.RancherM3End1Line0: Real charming, but let me handle it by myself next time, OK? I'm not as feeble as i look!
ST_VOText.BuiltDecoration2Line0: Really feels like you've got a vision here!
ST_VOText.FeedingCreature2Line0: Remember to chew it, lil' fella!
ST_VOText.MRSuggestionHarvest0Line0: Remember to harvest any crop that has become fully grown today!
ST_VOText.MRRestoredRegion0Line0: Restoring that region yesterday felt great.
ST_VOText.EnterMech3Line0: Revved up and ready to go!
ST_VOText.RancherM4End2Line0: Right! The eggs all have a common source!
ST_VOText.MechanicIntro0Line0: Right, connection's established. You can hear me, can't you?
ST_VOText.BotanistM2End2Line0: Right, w-well. You see, I used to be part of a research team at the Directorate University.
ST_VOText.BotanistM4End2Line2: S-shortly thereafter, I was told that faith in my work... a-and me... had been lost.
ST_VOText.BotanistM1Mid2Line1: S-so a large sample size is required to progress... By which I mean, like a farm!
ST_VOText.BuiltRT0Line5: S-so if it's not too much of a bother, I would require your assistance in preparing me a place to land on.
ST_VOText.BotanistM2End3Line5: S-so that's where you come in. If we can plant the spliced seeds at a large scale, we'll have m-many more chances for a breakthrough.
ST_VOText.BotanistM2End1Line0: S-sorry for not explaining earlier. I-I-I just get so carried away when it comes to my research.
ST_VOText.BotanistM4End1Line2: Securing the future of the Frontier through mutational farming.
ST_VOText.GrasslandsVaultSecondComputerPuzzle0Line: Seems like nothing critical, at least. I think we're safe and sound.
ST_VOText.ToolFound1Line1: Sending us probes out to the edge of the galaxy to scan for hospitable planets.
ST_VOText.PRRancherM6End0Line0: Should I not have done that?
ST_VOText.MRRainyWeather0Line0: Since it's raining today, you won't have to water your crops.
ST_VOText.BotanistWC1Line1: Sitting in a shelter and listening to the drops hitting the roof can be quite soothing.
ST_VOText.RuinFound2Line3: So from up here they have the same readings as a dull rock.
ST_VOText.RancherM1Mid2Line3: So let's hatch that egg and see what pops out!
ST_VOText.BotanistM2End3Line3: So we developed the Seed Splicer to speed up the mutative process, theoretically letting us catch up in a fraction of the time.
ST_VOText.PRRancherM4Intro3Line1: So where are all the eggs coming from?
ST_VOText.RancherM6End0Line0: So you did it all without asking me again, huh?
ST_VOText.RancherM2Intro2Line0: Some animals play fight to show affection, you just have to establish boundaries.
ST_VOText.ExitMech3Line0: Some things you just have to do yourself.
ST_VOText.MRSuggestionBuild0Line1: Something that'll inspire us while we do a hard day's work.
ST_VOText.RancherM1Mid0Line1: Sorry for being so curt on the radio before, I just needed to get here before you turned that egg into an omelette or something.
ST_VOText.MRStoryListener0Line1: Sorry if it's a bit out of nowhere but, well...
ST_VOText.RegionRestored2Line1: Speakling of, you wanna know what PIP-3R stands for?
ST_VOText.RancherWC1Line0: Staying indoors to read a book during the rain is overrated. I say it's the perfect time to get out and explore!
ST_VOText.ToolFound0Line3: Such a shame that it got canceled in the end.
ST_VOText.HarvestingCrop3Line0: Such good quality on these! Great job!
ST_VOText.RegionRestored2Line5: Suppose I should consider myself lucky.
ST_VOText.PRRancherM4Intro4Line1: Sure, I'll keep an eye out.
ST_VOText.PRBotanistM4Intro2Line1: Sure, I’ll take care of it.
ST_VOText.PRRancherM6End1Line1: Sure, but are we really calling it that?
ST_VOText.RancherSC1Line0: Sure, we can find new eggs in the wild and raise some friendly livestock, but they won't be properly domesticated.
ST_VOText.BotanistM3End0Line0: T-thank you for the assistance, it is very much appreciated.
ST_VOText.BotanistM4Intro0Line3: T-think about what we could achieve if we could harness and control those massive growth properties?!
ST_VOText.BotanistM4End1Line1: T-this is honestly so exciting, it-it could prove that I was right!
ST_VOText.ToolFound3Line1: Taking a chance on this one-way trip, only to get abandoned...
ST_VOText.PRRancherM3End0Line1: Tell me if you need anything else.
ST_VOText.PRBotanistM1Mid1Line1: Tell me more about these experiments.
ST_VOText.GrasslandsVaultAfterSecondPuzzle0Line0: Tell you what, I think I've figured out their method of energy transference.
ST_VOText.BotanistM5End0Line0: Thank you for putting that together, it r-really brightened up this place.
ST_VOText.BotanistM6End0Line0: Thank you for your assistance... w-with everything, I mean.
ST_VOText.MRStoryListener0Line4: Thanks for helping me get my thoughts in order.
ST_VOText.BotanistSC0Line0: That Seed Splicer you helped build has been working really well!
ST_VOText.ToolFound0Line1: That magnificent mech, those high-power tools, and even that ship of yours.
ST_VOText.MRCustomizeMech0Line0: That mech of yours is looking good today!
ST_VOText.HarvestingCrop2Line0: That one grew up real nice!
ST_VOText.WateredCrop2Line0: That plant's all nice and watered.
ST_VOText.WateredCrop3Line0: That should keep it good until tomorrow.
ST_VOText.GrasslandsVaultEnterComputerRoom0Line1: That thing sure looks like a computer station...
ST_VOText.PiperIntroduction0Line1: That was quite the tumble you took there.
ST_VOText.HologramContribution1Line0: That'll be finished in no time!
ST_VOText.SproutPlanted2Line0: That's a great spot for it.
ST_VOText.NewDiscovery2Line0: That's a new one! Great find!
ST_VOText.ArtifactComplete0Line0: That's all we need! I have compiled our findings in the database.
ST_VOText.RegionRestored1Line0: That's one more for the count, great job!
ST_VOText.ArtifactComplete1Line0: That's the last piece of the puzzle, I think I've figured out what went down here.
ST_VOText.RancherM2End2Line0: That's what I like to hear!
ST_VOText.RancherM4Intro6Line0: That's what we're trying to find out!
ST_VOText.RancherGC13Line0: The Collective was truly a collective back then, people of all ages and backgrounds joined together for a single cause.
ST_VOText.ToolFound0Line2: The Farmech Project really was extraordinary.
ST_VOText.BotanistGC4Line0: The Polyberries on your planet t-truly fascinate me.
ST_VOText.RancherGC8Line1: The animals back in my sanctuary, they're... they're like a second family to me.
ST_VOText.RancherGC6Line0: The animals on this planet are very docile, especially if they imprint on you after hatching. I had one of them jump straight into my arms when I reached out to pet them. Adorable things!
ST_VOText.RancherM2Intro0Line0: The animals on your planet have a remarkably docile temperament. I haven't had to wrestle a single one of them for dominance.
ST_VOText.MRCustomizeMech1Line1: The best looking ride in the frontier for sure!
ST_VOText.RancherGC13Line1: The bonds we forged on our expeditions created friendships to last a lifetime. I still keep in touch with many of them, they're all so dear to my heart.
ST_VOText.BotanistM4End0Line1: The cambium layer of the tree does not even remotely compare to anything else I have analyzed nearby.
ST_VOText.MRBuiltDecorationConstruct0Line0: The decorating you did yesterday really lit up the place!
ST_VOText.RegionRestored0Line1: The ecosystem in this region is adjusting itself lickety-split.
ST_VOText.RancherM4End0Line1: The egg shards were found all over the planet and belonged to a bunch of different species.
ST_VOText.BotanistGC9Line1: The electroplaques within its branches create a current strong enough to shock any p-parasitic insect that tries to get close.
ST_VOText.BotanistM6Intro4Line1: The end result was useless, b-but the process was valid, t-this was merely a step in the elimination process!
ST_VOText.VaultDoorStatus2Line0: The energy readings are still on the rise here.
ST_VOText.BotanistGC2Line0: The f-flowers in my beard are a side effect of my homemade beard wax.
ST_VOText.BotanistWC2Line0: The f-fog almost got me turned around while foraging earlier.
ST_VOText.Headlights0Line0: The headlights would make work a lot easier for us.
ST_VOText.RancherM1End3Line1: The lens color you use in the incubator seems to affect the egg somehow, so try experimenting with different ones to see what happens!
ST_VOText.RancherGC0Line0: The lenses in the incubator don't have any special properties per se, it's just that different color light seems to have an effect on the eggs.
ST_VOText.MerchantIntroduction0Line2: The name is Dolores, but my friends call me Lola, and I'm your friendly neighborhood merchant.
ST_VOText.BotanistGC8Line1: The particles are then assembled and formed as a shell to protect the otherwise quite fragile inner plant, l-like bark on a tree!
ST_VOText.BotanistM2End3Line1: The plants in the Frontier certainly have many useful capacities, but they are relatively primitive compared to the highly specialized cultivars that were produced on Earth.
ST_VOText.BuiltRT0Line3: The reason I'm contacting you is, well, I'm in a spot of trouble.
ST_VOText.RancherM6Intro1Line0: The substance on the egg shards!
ST_VOText.MRPositivity1Line0: The weather's real nice, let's get out there and seize the day!
ST_VOText.RancherM1Mid2Line1: The wildlife in the frontier is unlike anything you might've seen back on Earth.
ST_VOText.RancherGC11Line1: Their free-spirited approach was a breath of fresh air compared to the stuffy chambers of academia.
ST_VOText.FindBadRegion0Line1: There are a few regions like this one.
ST_VOText.RancherGC10Line1: There are so many different factions with their own goals and ideals, they might just tear the whole thing apart if they were free to do as they please.
ST_VOText.RancherGC16Line0: There are some great wide open spaces over in the Lowland Plains, it could be suitable for any animal that needs that bit of extra room to be comfortable.
ST_VOText.RegionRestored0Line4: There just might be hope for this planet yet.
ST_VOText.BotanistGC0Line0: There was a-a bit of a setback on one of my overnight experiments.
ST_VOText.RegionRestored3Line3: There were a few other models like "Nimble", "Efficient", "Adaptible" and so on.
ST_VOText.TornadoAlert0Line0: There's a storm coming, we need to protect the harvest!
ST_VOText.RancherM4Mid0Line0: These egg shards are in excellent condition! I was half afraid you'd crush them with that mech of yours.
ST_VOText.RuinFound1Line2: These things have not moved an inch since I first arrived.
ST_VOText.BotanistGC3Line1: They come in s-so many different shapes and sizes...
ST_VOText.BotanistM2End3Line2: They had thousands of years of development and mutation to reach that state, and we have barely had two centuries.
ST_VOText.BotanistGC4Line1: They have impressive elastic properties and can easily be used as a substitute for plastic!
ST_VOText.RancherGC7Line1: They may be huge but are actually pretty soft once you show them who's in charge.
ST_VOText.BotanistGC5Line1: They usually get pretty w-worried whenever it gets delayed.
ST_VOText.RestorationAction2Line0: Things are really starting to look up here now.
ST_VOText.MRSuggestionRequest1Line0: Things have been going pretty well for us lately.
ST_VOText.RancherM2Intro3Line1: Things like access to food, water, and comfort all play a role in helping your new friends thrive.
ST_VOText.RancherGC10Line0: Thinking on it, the red tape might be the only thing keeping the Directorate together.
ST_VOText.RancherWC5Line0: This big old hat really comes in handy on days like these, doubling as a fan and keeping the sun out of my eyes while I'm working on things.
ST_VOText.CraftingResource4Line0: This building is starting to pay off!
ST_VOText.RancherWC3Line0: This fog sure ain't making things easier for us, so let's try not to get lost out there.
ST_VOText.CloseToCreature1Line0: This is one of my favorites!
ST_VOText.RancherM4End3Line1: This is the biggest breakthrough for the Collective in decades! I've got so many letters to send!
ST_VOText.DamFound0Line0: This old thing caught your eye, huh?
ST_VOText.MRCustomizeMech0Line1: Those modifications you did yesterday really paid off.
ST_VOText.MRCustomizeMech1Line0: Those new mech parts made a world of difference.
ST_VOText.TornadoAlert2Line0: Tornado incoming! We need to do something!
ST_VOText.Headlights4Line0: Turn 'em headlights on, it'll help us out.
ST_VOText.BotanistM6Intro0Line0: U-unfortunately, I have some disheartening news to share.
ST_VOText.GrasslandsVaultSecondComputerPuzzle0Line: Uh oh, I think some other system was using that energy...
ST_VOText.MRStorySeeing0Line3: Until now, It's all been just an array of different values and data.
ST_VOText.PiperIntroduction2Line2: Up there in the sky; that blinking dot is yours truly!
ST_VOText.BotanistGC9Line0: Up-upon closer inspection, the electric field generated by Zappertwigs seems to be a defense mechanism.
ST_VOText.BotanistM4End3Line2: W-well, dear research partner, I better get back to figuring out this mutation!
ST_VOText.BotanistM2Intro0Line0: W-well, let us get right into it!
ST_VOText.BotanistM1Mid2Line0: W-well, mutations occur almost every day, especially when plants are grown in certain reactive soils. B-but only a fraction of them are an actual beneficial mutation.
ST_VOText.BotanistDialogueStart0Line0: W-what can I do for you?
ST_VOText.BotanistGC8Line0: W-while Gravelgourds seem to grow rocks out of nowhere, they actually have an intricate root system that draws mineral particles out of the soil.
ST_VOText.BotanistM3Intro0Line3: W-would you be able to lend me a hand? It would be of great help.
ST_VOText.BotanistM1Mid2Line2: W-would you be willing to add some spliced seeds to your crops and let m-me study the results?
ST_VOText.BotanistM1End0Line1: Wait! L-let me explain what I can do for you before I get c-carried away.
ST_VOText.BasicResourcePickUp2Line0: We can always find a use for this.
ST_VOText.BuiltCore2Line0: We can make good use of this.
ST_VOText.RancherM6End2Line0: We can workshop the name some other time. Still, glad to have you on board!
ST_VOText.RancherM4Intro2Line0: We can't figure out where their eggs come from.
ST_VOText.Headlights3Line0: We could really use some lights right now.
ST_VOText.GrasslandsVaultThirdComputerPuzzle0Line5: We need to get to the bottom of this.
ST_VOText.MRSuggestionVaultDoor0Line2: We should go check it out!
ST_VOText.RancherM6End3Line0: We'll make an exozoologist out of you yet. The hunt is on!
ST_VOText.GrasslandsVaultFlooding0Line1: We'll need to find a way to get across to get out of here.
ST_VOText.PRBotanistM4End2Line1: We'll prove you right, don't worry.
ST_VOText.MRSuggestionBuy1Line0: We're pretty good on money, how about spending it?
ST_VOText.PiperIntroduction1Line1: We've got a planet to explore!
ST_VOText.HazardAlert4Line0: We've got trouble, better check the crops.
ST_VOText.RancherM4Intro4Line0: We've studied them in all kinds of conditions, in the wild, in enclosures, anywhere! The dang things never laid a single egg. They don't even have the biology for it!
ST_VOText.BotanistM2End2Line2: We, um, had done lots of statistical modelling and discovered that at the current rate of growth, even the bounties of the Central Frontier Directorate will run out within just a few generations.
ST_VOText.StoreSell2Line0: Well I can't not buy it, can I?
ST_VOText.CloseToRT0Line1: Well I'll be. Sounds like one of your neighbors is trying to reach out.
ST_VOText.RancherM1End0Line0: Well gosh! You took care of all that before I even had a chance to start.
ST_VOText.RancherM1Mid2Line0: Well like I said, my name is Diane and I run an animal sanctuary on my planet.
ST_VOText.RancherM2End0Line0: Well well well, it seems like your little friends are as happy as can be.
ST_VOText.RancherM3End0Line0: Well you went and did it all anyway. I told you I could handle it!
ST_VOText.RancherM1End3Line2: Well, I'll let you familiarize yourself with the equipment before I hassle you again. I'm going to pay a visit to the local wildlife.
ST_VOText.ToolFound2Line0: Well, abandoning the Lightyear Frontier for Mars does make some sense.
ST_VOText.RancherSC0Line1: Well, it means that we can't do any selective breeding.
ST_VOText.HazardModerateSuccess0Line0: Well, that could have gone better.
ST_VOText.RancherM4Mid0Line1: Well, together with my own batch of shards, I have more than enough to start a detailed analysis!
ST_VOText.BotanistBC0Line1: What a g-great day to conduct some experiments.
ST_VOText.RancherM1Intro0Line0: What do you think you're doing with that egg there, buster?
ST_VOText.PlayerBotanistCollectionStarter0Line0: What mutated crops do you need?
ST_VOText.MechanicIntro0Line4: What's that? Yes, Shelley, I was just about to...
ST_VOText.RuinFound2Line2: Whatever material they're made of is incredibly resistant to scanning.
ST_VOText.VaultDoorStatus1Line3: Whatever we've been doing around here, let's keep doing it!
ST_VOText.RancherM1Mid3Line1: While we're at it, I'll start setting up a fence around my property. I don't want any unsolicited critters wandering about.
ST_VOText.GrasslandsVaultMainHall0Line1: Who built this, and why was it locked down so tight?
ST_VOText.RegionRestored0Line0: Whoa! That seems to have done the trick.
ST_VOText.RuinFound1Line3: Whoever used to live here has not been around for a long time.
ST_VOText.GrasslandsVaultFlooding0Line0: Whoops, looks like we unpowered whatever was keeping the hydration systems in check.
ST_VOText.SleepReminder3Line0: Why don't we come back to this after a good night's sleep?
ST_VOText.MRSuggestionPlant0Line0: Why don't we try and plant some seeds today, huh?
ST_VOText.MRRainyWeather0Line1: Why don't you sow some more seeds? They'll also benefit from the rain!
ST_VOText.RancherM6End1Line4: Will you help me find the Easter Bunny?
ST_VOText.RancherM6End1Line3: With that said, I have a big favor to ask.
ST_VOText.ArtifactComplete2Line0: With that, I think we've got as clear a picture as we're going to get.
ST_VOText.NewDiscovery1Line0: Wonder what new things we can do with this?
ST_VOText.MRBuiltCoreConstruct0Line1: Would be a shame to just leave it hanging.
ST_VOText.SleepReminder4Line0: Would you look at the time? Let's get some well-earned rest.
ST_VOText.GrasslandsVaultMainHall1Line2: Would've sustained life here for a very long time.
ST_VOText.GrasslandsVaultElevator0Line0: Wow, this goes deeper than my sensors can reach.
ST_VOText.MRSuggestionArtifacts0Line0: Y'know, I think there are more artifacts to find in those ruins out there.
ST_VOText.RequestTurnInBotanist2Line1: Y-you did all this for my sake? That's so kind of you!
ST_VOText.BotanistGC1Line0: Y-you probably have some questions regarding the leaf on my head.
ST_VOText.RuinFound0Line1: Yeah, there's a bunch of them littered around the planet, never did figure out who left them.
ST_VOText.BotanistM5Intro0Line0: Yes, I-I could actually use a second pair of hands right now.
ST_VOText.RequestTurnInBotanist0Line0: You actually did it? I'm beyond grateful.
ST_VOText.RancherM1Intro0Line1: You better hold on to it and build me an outpost so I can come take a look, OK? OK!
ST_VOText.RancherWC2Line0: You can bearly see anything out there today. Better keep an extra eye on any animals running around so you don't lose them.
ST_VOText.MRSuggestionUpgrade1Line1: You can probably find more upgrades for it in the dock.
ST_VOText.PRRancherM1End0Line1: You don't need to push yourself.
ST_VOText.StoreSell1Line0: You drive a hard bargain, I like it!
ST_VOText.MerchantDialogueStart0Line0: You here for trading or chatting?
ST_VOText.MRSuggestionVaultDoor0Line0: You know that huge door from before?
ST_VOText.RancherM5End0Line3: You know what, I'll set that test to run overnight, I've got some sleep to catch up on.
ST_VOText.MRStorySeeing0Line4: You know, weather statistics, soil salinity level, all that neat stuff.
ST_VOText.ToolFound4Line1: You probably found that ship in a scrapheap somewhere and took off for greener pastures, right?
ST_VOText.HazardModerateSuccess2Line0: You put up a good fight!
ST_VOText.BotanistM1Mid1Line1: You see, I-I have spent years experimenting with plant seeds in an effort to trigger beneficial mutations. Your skill set may be just what I need to p-progress in my research.
ST_VOText.BotanistM1Intro0Line4: You see, well, I'm a botanic scientist, a-and seeing that you're a farmer and all, maybe we could do some form of collaboration?
ST_VOText.RancherGC7Line0: You'd find yourself speechless if you saw any of the megafauna living back on my planet.
ST_VOText.RancherM4Intro1Line1: You'd think humanity would have accomplished that in the 200-odd years we've been here, but it's actually not that simple.
ST_VOText.MRNoSleep2Line0: You're quite the night-owl. Gonna be alright for the rest of the day?
ST_VOText.RestorationAction1Line0: You're really doing this area a service.
ST_VOText.RequestTurnInBotanist1Line0: You're too kind, you have my gratitude.
ST_VOText.BotanistM1Mid3Line1: You've agreed, j-just like that? W-well in that case, we need to build a Seed Splicer so we can get-get started!
ST_VOText.MRPositivity2Line0: You've been doing real well since you arrived.
ST_VOText.PiperGratitude4Line0: You've got my gratitude in spades!
ST_VOText.RegionRestored4Line5: You've proved I was right to believe in this planet.
ST_VOText.MRBuiltDecorationConstruct1Line1: You've really got an eye for that kinda thing!
ST_VOText.MRSuggestionBuy0Line0: You've saved up quite a bit of cash, how about getting yourself something nice?
ST_VOText.GrasslandsVaultElevator0Line1: Your mech will have to be my eyes and ears.
ST_VOText.PrometheusRepOngoingGreeting0: “Alright, here’s the deal: The Department of Agri-Mechanical Experimental Technologies is looking for donations to develop new technology for all the Mechs out there. We just need a couple hundred thousand components to get going, no biggie!”
ST_VOText.PrometheusRepOngoingGreeting2: “Assisting us in researching new technology is, of course, optional, but wouldn’t you rather be able to look back and say ‘I was there, I contributed to Professor Antimony’s genius invention!’? Think about it, okay?"
ST_VOText.TempestRepS3Gratitude1: “By the Pillar itself, that’s a massive delivery, friend! Just how tempered is your heart?”
ST_VOText.TempestRepS2Greeting0: “Gotta tell you, friend, I worry sometimes. It’s hard to think about packing your bags and leaving your home planet behind forever. Your tempering is clearly stronger than mine.”
ST_VOText.WildernestRepS3Greeting0: “Hello hello, this is Radio Rose reporting live from Wildernest! The weather is a beautiful ‘I-can’t-see-the-sky-because-of-the-dense-tree-coverage’ as usual. What’s up?”
ST_VOText.TempestRepS2Greeting1: “My colleagues had a bit of a gathering around the water cooler earlier today. Some of em thinking about moving to Verdemere. I don’t know if I have it in me to replace my lungs with hardware just to be able to step outside. Cybernetic implants are just so… final, you know?”
ST_VOText.VerdemereRepS1Intro0: “Name’s Ray, I’m a mechanic specializing in cybernetic implants. I'll give it to you straight: We need a steady supplier of microcrystal components for our mechanical lungs, or my people will suffocate before long. We don't have much to offer, but are you willing to trade?”
ST_VOText.TempestRepS1Intro0: “Solid steel and good day to you, stranger! Name's Ferris! My job's to process all incoming goods to Tempest Prime if you're here to trade. We're all good on metals, but we need non-magnetic power sources for our Surface Dome Habitation Project."
ST_VOText.TempestRepS3Intro0: “The dome team just reported a record streak of progress, no interruptions whatsoever... Honestly, friend, I was close to giving up hope until you came along. I Started to make plans to move to one planet or the other, but none felt right. Thanks to you, I might be able to stay where I belong."
ST_VOText.VerdemereRepS2Gratitude1: “This is good quality. Are you sure you don’t want more in exchange?”
ST_VOText.CryolisHelpCall0: “We won’t last the winter like this!”
ST_VOText.PrometheusRepOngoingGreeting1: “We’re gathering support from every country bumpk- ahem, every agricultural professional across the Frontier, so I’m only asking you for a fraction of the total needed. Even if you don’t give us anything, we’ll still share the results of our research free of charge when we’re done. Scientific principles and all that.”
ST_VOText.PrometheusRepFullContributionGreeting1: “Your contribution to D.A.M.E.T. is most appreciated and will not go unnoticed, et cetera et cetera. We’re going to use it to make some real cool sh- ahem, stuff!”

TechnicalTerms.PhotosensitivityDisclaimerPrompt:
A very small percentage of individuals may experience epileptic seizures when exposed to certain flashing lights or light patterns.
Even individuals with no history of seizures or epilepsy may have undiagnosed conditions that can induce epileptic symptoms while playing video games.

If you or any of your relatives have a history of seizures or epilepsy, consult a doctor before playing video games.

IMMEDIATELY stop playing and consult your doctor if you experience any symptoms, including:
- Dizziness
- Altered vision
- Eye or muscle twitching
- Any involuntary movement
- Disorientation
- Momentary loss of awareness

You may reduce the risk of photosensitive epileptic seizures by taking the following precautions:
- Do not play if you are drowsy or fatigued
- Play in a well-lit room
